description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet with a modern design, featuring a wood grain texture on the top, sides, and front. The front face has two vertically aligned doors with subtle rectangular paneling and small round handles at the bottom, suggesting easy access to the interior. The sides and top display a consistent, dark gray wood pattern, while the back appears to be a plain, lighter gray panel. The cabinet is likely constructed from engineered wood or laminate, giving it a sturdy yet contemporary appearance. Its size and design make it suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or apartment entryways. The flat top surface can support additional objects, and the interior likely provides ample storage space.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with a dark gray wood grain finish, two front doors, and small round handles. The design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors with small round handles at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the continuous dark gray wood grain texture with no visible features.
description_view_2: Back view with a plain, light gray panel and no visible handles or paneling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the wood grain texture.
